description_long: This object depicts a pair of modern, attached residential houses with flat roofs and a shared driveway or street running between them. The facades are clad in light tan brickwork, featuring a mix of large and small rectangular windows with black frames, and some units have garage doors at street level. The rear sides include private green lawns, a cylindrical water tank, and outdoor seating, suggesting family-oriented living. The houses are set within a rectangular plot bordered by low walls, with small patches of grass and paved walkways leading to the entrances. The overall design is boxy and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional, urban living. The roofs appear accessible and may serve as terraces or utility spaces.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed, attached houses with tan brick facades, large windows, and private rear lawns, separated by a central driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrances, garage doors, and symmetrical window arrangement on the tan brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central driveway, side windows, and the separation between the two houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying private lawns, a cylindrical water tank, and outdoor seating areas behind the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side walls, and additional green spaces adjacent to the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entryways with flat doors, minimal steps, and no porch or decorative columns
